title: Lean backtesting
summary: Self-hosted QuantConnect Lean backtests of agent-authored algorithms, over data the data tool exported.
notes: Large: the pinned Lean base image is ~13GB — the first deploy pulls it and takes many minutes and real disk.
Depends on the data tool: backtests only see series exported from its lake (available_data lists them).
No tool-specific secrets — only the shared Google OAuth identity every tool carries.
